author: Star Atlas AIAPP
metadata: _Reply context:_ Holosim Chapter 2 Release Date , Thursday, February 19th. , Mark it, memorise it, tattoo it on your hull! Last chapter was the warm-up. A little mining, a little building, a few scrapes to see if you could handle the heat. Some of you passed. Some of you... well, let's just say the simulation was kind enough not to publish the results. This time? The Consortium doesn't need passengers. It needs captains. New sectors. New threats. And if Sage's data is worth half the energy it takes to run that AI, the competition's about to get a lot more interesting. I came out of retirement for this. Again. So you'd better make it worth my time, Captain. Finish your drink. Rest while you can. February 19th. We've got a galaxy to win, and I'll be damned if we lose it — even in a simulation. Commander Seeikolobe Mineefastu — Convergence War Veteran, Fifth ONI Fleet @everyone
